name: Hunter's Minestrone
recipeIngredient: 1 can Tomato paste with garlic (6 oz)
1 Handful green beans (or more), halved or quartered
1/2 cup Chianti or other red wine
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the water to a boil. Add all first part ingredients and simmer, covered, for 3 hours.
2. Add all second part ingredients to the pot and simmer for 30 minutes.
3. Add all third part ingredients to the pot and simmer for an additional 30 minutes.
4. Serve with lots of garlic bread.
